item.title: 2.1]電動車影響精神科用藥！？碳酸鋰市場價格波動，病友會受到影響嗎？ ft. 哇賽心理學
item.itunes:title: 2.1]電動車影響精神科用藥！？碳酸鋰市場價格波動，病友會受到影響嗎？ ft. 哇賽心理學
item.itunes:author: PanSci 泛科學
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y5ldL85iW78 #老協珍人蔘精 豐富人蔘皂苷精華 高效補氣、增強體力！陪你挑戰真人生 https://lxz.com.tw/product/OEG003 *建議開啟cc字幕，獲得最佳觀看體驗* *訂正：「鋰」的正確讀音應為三聲「ㄌㄧˇ」，本集錄音時都念錯成二聲 00:00 開場 00:40 老協珍人蔘精 廣告段落 01:24 什麼是「躁症」？ 02:12 躁症 ≠ 躁鬱症？ 03:00 躁鬱症名人 04:16 情緒穩定劑－鋰鹽 05:00 天竺鼠實驗 06:34 鋰鹽的藥效 08:10 碳酸鋰的價格上漲？ 09:21 其他替代藥物 // 延伸閱讀 // 阿茲海默症靠吃藥效果有限？關鍵基因找到了！ https://pansci.asia/archives/368275#google_vignette 精神個案系列：吃鋰鹽，會早洩？！ https://pansci.asia/archives/360948 // 參考資料 // https://asia.nikkei.com/Business/Technology/EV-boom-threatens-supply-of-lifesaving-medicine-in-Japan https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/brb3.2262 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK493168/ https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK558998/ https://people.com/music/mariah-carey-bipolar-disorder-diagnosis-exclusive/ https://www.usmagazine.com/celebrity-news/news/britney-spears-is-on-the-right-medication-after-conservatorship/ https://people.com/archive/cover-story-bad-to-worse-vol-54-no-26/ https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-1-349-07289-7 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2490569/?page=1 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3712976/ https://www.health.harvard.edu/diseases-and-conditions/treatments-for-gout https://cosmosmagazine.com/health/john-cade-and-the-discovery-of-lithium/?fbclid=IwAR2zQNV3hcILPFIh_kulWOXUjhSKzPPUSGWy2cyf9YajE9EM8Mt9Fc6Unis https://www.wma.net/policies-post/wma-declaration-of-helsinki-ethical-principles-for-medical-research-involving-human-subjects/ https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK519062/ https://www.mdpi.com/1422-0067/19/7/2143 https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4360/12/12/3055 https://open.oregonstate.education/aandp/chapter/12-5-the-action-potential/ https://www.reuters.com/markets/commodities/china-lithium-price-poised-further-decline-2024-analysts-2023-12-01/ https://www1.racgp.org.au/newsgp/professional/pandemic-challenging-australia-s-medication-supply https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/article-abstract/303604 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK559112/ https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK482455/ https://journalbipolardisorders.springeropen.com/articles/10.1186/s40345-023-00301-y https://www.statista.com/chart/28037/lithium-carbonate-price-timeline/ // 製作團隊 // 主持：泛科知識 #鄭國威知識長 企劃：謝富丞 腳本：胡中行 剪輯：陳韻心 想和我們有更多互動嗎？加入會員 ► https://lihi1.com/BWeoe
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y5ldL85iW78 #老協珍人蔘精 豐富人蔘皂苷精華 高效補氣、增強體力！陪你挑戰真人生 https://lxz.com.tw/product/OEG003 *建議開啟cc字幕，獲得最佳觀看體驗* *訂正：「鋰」的正確讀音應為三聲「ㄌㄧˇ」，本集錄音時都念錯成二聲 00:00 開場 00:40 老協珍人蔘精 廣告段落 01:24 什麼是「躁症」？ 02:12 躁症 ≠ 躁鬱症？ 03:00 躁鬱症名人 04:16 情緒穩定劑－鋰鹽 05:00 天竺鼠實驗 06:34 鋰鹽的藥效 08:10 碳酸鋰的價格上漲？ 09:21 其他替代藥物 // 延伸閱讀 // 阿茲海默症靠吃藥效果有限？關鍵基因找到了！ https://pansci.asia/archives/368275#google_vignette 精神個案系列：吃鋰鹽，會早洩？！ https://pansci.asia/archives/360948 // 參考資料 // https://asia.nikkei.com/Business/Technology/EV-boom-threatens-supply-of-lifesaving-medicine-in-Japan https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/brb3.2262 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK493168/ https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK558998/ https://people.com/music/mariah-carey-bipolar-disorder-diagnosis-exclusive/ https://www.usmagazine.com/celebrity-news/news/britney-spears-is-on-the-right-medication-after-conservatorship/ https://people.com/archive/cover-story-bad-to-worse-vol-54-no-26/ https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-1-349-07289-7 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2490569/?page=1 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3712976/ https://www.health.harvard.edu/diseases-and-conditions/treatments-for-gout https://cosmosmagazine.com/health/john-cade-and-the-discovery-of-lithium/?fbclid=IwAR2zQNV3hcILPFIh_kulWOXUjhSKzPPUSGWy2cyf9YajE9EM8Mt9Fc6Unis https://www.wma.net/policies-post/wma-declaration-of-helsinki-ethical-principles-for-medical-research-involving-human-subjects/ https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK519062/ https://www.mdpi.com/1422-0067/19/7/2143 https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4360/12/12/3055 https://open.oregonstate.education/aandp/chapter/12-5-the-action-potential/ https://www.reuters.com/markets/commodities/china-lithium-price-poised-further-decline-2024-analysts-2023-12-01/ https://www1.racgp.org.au/newsgp/professional/pandemic-challenging-australia-s-medication-supply https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/article-abstract/303604 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK559112/ https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK482455/ https://journalbipolardisorders.springeropen.com/articles/10.1186/s40345-023-00301-y https://www.statista.com/chart/28037/lithium-carbonate-price-timeline/ // 製作團隊 // 主持：泛科知識 #鄭國威知識長 企劃：謝富丞 腳本：胡中行 剪輯：陳韻心 想和我們有更多互動嗎？加入會員 ► https://lihi1.com/BWeoe
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y5ldL85iW78
#老協珍人蔘精 豐富人蔘皂苷精華
高效補氣、增強體力！陪你挑戰真人生
https://lxz.com.tw/product/OEG003

*建議開啟cc字幕，獲得最佳觀看體驗*

*訂正：「鋰」的正確讀音應為三聲「ㄌㄧˇ」，本集錄音時都念錯成二聲

00:00 開場
00:40 老協珍人蔘精 廣告段落
01:24 什麼是「躁症」？
02:12 躁症 ≠ 躁鬱症？
03:00 躁鬱症名人
04:16 情緒穩定劑－鋰鹽
05:00 天竺鼠實驗
06:34 鋰鹽的藥效
08:10 碳酸鋰的價格上漲？
09:21 其他替代藥物

// 延伸閱讀 //
阿茲海默症靠吃藥效果有限？關鍵基因找到了！
https://pansci.asia/archives/368275#google_vignette
精神個案系列：吃鋰鹽，會早洩？！
https://pansci.asia/archives/360948

// 參考資料 //
https://asia.nikkei.com/Business/Technology/EV-boom-threatens-supply-of-lifesaving-medicine-in-Japan
https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/brb3.2262
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK493168/
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK558998/
https://people.com/music/mariah-carey-bipolar-disorder-diagnosis-exclusive/
https://www.usmagazine.com/celebrity-news/news/britney-spears-is-on-the-right-medication-after-conservatorship/
https://people.com/archive/cover-story-bad-to-worse-vol-54-no-26/
https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-1-349-07289-7
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2490569/?page=1
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3712976/
https://www.health.harvard.edu/diseases-and-conditions/treatments-for-gout
https://cosmosmagazine.com/health/john-cade-and-the-discovery-of-lithium/?fbclid=IwAR2zQNV3hcILPFIh_kulWOXUjhSKzPPUSGWy2cyf9YajE9EM8Mt9Fc6Unis
https://www.wma.net/policies-post/wma-declaration-of-helsinki-ethical-principles-for-medical-research-involving-human-subjects/
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK519062/
https://www.mdpi.com/1422-0067/19/7/2143
https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4360/12/12/3055
https://open.oregonstate.education/aandp/chapter/12-5-the-action-potential/
https://www.reuters.com/markets/commodities/china-lithium-price-poised-further-decline-2024-analysts-2023-12-01/
https://www1.racgp.org.au/newsgp/professional/pandemic-challenging-australia-s-medication-supply
https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/article-abstract/303604
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK559112/
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK482455/
https://journalbipolardisorders.springeropen.com/articles/10.1186/s40345-023-00301-y
https://www.statista.com/chart/28037/lithium-carbonate-price-timeline/

// 製作團隊 //
主持：泛科知識 #鄭國威知識長
企劃：謝富丞
腳本：胡中行
剪輯：陳韻心

想和我們有更多互動嗎？加入會員 ► https://lihi1.com/BWeoe
